x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Device registration in DEX establishes the endpoint population that AI diagnostic capabilities analyze. Without sufficient registered devices, DEX AI has no data to pattern-match against for proactive issue detection and root cause analysis.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(checkDef, dateFilter) { var ga = new GlideAggregate("dex_device"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var actualValue = count + " devices registered in DEX"; if (count >= 100) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " devices registered in DEX. AI diagnostic capabilities have a broad device population to analyze for patterns and anomalies." }; } else if (count >= 10) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " devices registered in DEX (target: 100+). Expand Desktop Assistant deployment to more endpoints." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " devices registered in DEX. Deploy the DEX Desktop Assistant to managed endpoints first." }; }})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Deploy the DEX Desktop Assistant (sn_dex_desktop) to endpoint devices. Devices must register with the DEX platform before telemetry collection can begin. Target: all managed endpoints registered.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c3f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c73
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Device registration in DEX establishes the endpoint population that AI diagnostic capabilities analyze. Without sufficient registered devices, DEX AI has no data to pattern-match against for proactive issue detection and root cause analysis.]]></ai_justification><check_name>DEX Device Registration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) { var ga = new GlideAggregate("dex_device"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var actualValue = count + " devices registered in DEX"; if (count >= 100) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " devices registered in DEX. AI diagnostic capabilities have a broad device population to analyze for patterns and anomalies." }; } else if (count >= 10) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " devices registered in DEX (target: 100+). Expand Desktop Assistant deployment to more endpoints." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " devices registered in DEX. Deploy the DEX Desktop Assistant to managed endpoints first." }; }})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>DEX</module><number>CHK0000516</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Deploy the DEX Desktop Assistant (sn_dex_desktop) to endpoint devices. Devices must register with the DEX platform before telemetry collection can begin. Target: all managed endpoints registered.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>c3f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c73</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>DEX Device Registration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_c3f85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c73</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
